meaning: v.鍐风瑧,璁ョ瑧,鍢茬瑧n.鍐风瑧,鍢茬瑧
examples: A smile, frown, raised an eyebrow, yawn, and sneer all convey information.
A faint sneer of satisfaction crossed her face.
Canete's mouth twisted in a contemptuous sneer.
The more seasoned cast members relish their opportunities to melodramatically sneer, flounce and bluster as required.
What does seem to work is something Japan Inc. used to sneer at - shareholder value.
